qa_pairs.question: How do users request Ampere A100 or A5000 GPU cards when running a job on the Graham cluster, and how many cards are typically requested per node in the examples provided?
qa_pairs.answer: To request Ampere A100 GPU cards on the Graham cluster, users should specify `--gres=gpu:a100:2`. For Ampere A5000 GPU cards, the specification is `--gres=gpu:a5000:2`. In both examples, two Ampere cards are requested per node.

qa_pairs.question: When will the Graham cluster's operational capacity be reduced, and what will be its capacity percentage after this reduction?
qa_pairs.answer: Starting January 13, 2025, the Graham cluster will operate at approximately 25% capacity. This reduction will continue until the new Nibi system comes online.
